title: Chains of Creation
description: A modpack where you are locked and you need to forge to survive !
body:
**Welcome to Chains of Creation !**

**WARNING : The modpack in the current state may create softlock in very early game, so you need to restart your world if you cannot progress cause of chunk lock !**

## Summary :
This modpack is based around multiple mods and datapacks :
(others will be added when those main focus are finished)

Mods : 
- Create 0.6
- Overgeared

Datapacks :
- Chunk Lock

The concept is simple you are locked in a small area that you can expend and you need to survive ! The basic progression as been changed by Overgeared, now you need to forge to craft Copper --> Iron --> Steel. All of the craft, even modded ones will be changed in the future (for now not all of them). 

## Questions : 

**When does the next update will come ?** : 

  I don't know I am busy in my life and I don't have much time to work on this, so wait and see !

**I saw your last mods project, are they canceled and is this one like them ?** : 

Yes and no, I don't plan to update them and I lost some file, but maybe one day I will have the courage to go deeper and redo all those project in neoforge for real and not modrinth. Of course this project will not be wasted like that, because it's a modpack not a mods, so no risk of lost from that part.

**I have a suggestion for the modpack** : 

Perfect, I will try to make a discord in future version of the pack, so you can already put those, but I may take some time to see them for now.

**How do I craft XXXXX ?** :

You can already find some tutorial for Overgeared on YT, this is where I discovered this mod, so go watch them and you can still check JEI that can help with this.

## Futur plans : 

- Changing all recipes to Overgeared ones !
- Adding recipes to link those with create !
- Adding some quests to that !
- Changing failed recipes to make more sense (if you have a idea to be more fair with the player it will help) !
- Will see maybe more mods and more changes to come !

**ENJOY !!!!**
